steps.title: Include Schubart's description
steps.content: The student wants to explain how Schubart describes C minor. The relevant notes identify Ideas Toward an Aesthetic of Music and state that Schubart describes C minor as expressing "longing." The song note is only an example of C minor.

steps.title: Reject incomplete details
steps.content: Choice A defines a musical key. Choice B says Schubart describes C minor but omits the specific mood. Choice D shifts to "Don't Speak" rather than Schubart's description. The answer is C.
